Welcome To KINGSTRADE FX

What We Do

We are a forex trading company that helps clients navigate the financial markets with confidence. Using advanced tools and expert insights, we turn your trading goals into achievable results.

Identify Opportunities

We spot profitable trading opportunities in the forex market by combining market analysis with real-time data.

Manage Risk

We assess the risks for every trade, ensuring that you have the best chance for reward while managing your exposure.

Optimize Portfolios

We build and optimize your forex portfolio with the help of intelligent tools and expert trading strategies.

ABOUT KINGSTRADE FX

“Frontier in the fintech space, we have shown the way others now follow.” and have maintained the status of 'first' in many dimensions of the investment space.

KINGSTRADE FX is a blockchain-based investment company created to help the average person reach her/his finanical dream.

At KINGSTRADE FX, we take resposibility for investor's success and portfolio performance

Founder

KINGSTRADE FX builds and manages portfolios tailored to the investor's financial needs, and deploys technology with expertise to ensure these finanical goals are met.

How To Join

Forex Trading Onboarding Process

Here’s a simple guide on how you can start trading with KINGSTRADE FX. Our process is straightforward, backed by years of forex trading expertise.

  • Register
  • Select Plan
  • Fund Account
  • Withdraw Profits
Create a Trading Account

To start trading with KINGSTRADE FX, begin by registering a new account. Simply click the SIGNUP button at the top of the page and fill out the easy registration form.

  • Free Registration
  • Earn Referral Bonuses
  • Access to a Free Consultation
  • No Geographic Restrictions
  • Quick and Easy Signup Process
Choose Your Trading Plan

After registration, choose the trading plan that matches your financial goals and investment level. We offer multiple plans designed to suit a wide range of traders.

  • Flexible Plan Options
  • High ROI
  • Match Plans to Your Trading Goals
  • Diverse Selection
  • Plans Backed by Market Insights
Fund Your Trading Account

Once you’ve selected your trading plan, the next step is to fund your account. You can easily add funds through several secure options based on your location.

  • Direct Funding Options
  • Fast Funding Process
  • Localized Payment Methods
  • No Funding Fees
  • Secure Transactions
Withdraw Your Profits

As soon as your trades start yielding profits, you can easily withdraw funds to your local account. We offer fast, secure withdrawals in the currency of your region.

  • Instant Withdrawals
  • No Withdrawal Fees
  • Withdraw to Local Currency
  • Profits Reflect in Your Account Immediately
  • Option to Reinvest Profits

Progressive Portfolios

Testimonial

What Our Client Say

My husband and I have tried a couple of investment companies in the past; many couldn't deliver on their promises, so when we tried KINGSTRADE FX, i didn't really expect much, but when we started seeing our profits I was so excited I had to tell all my friends. Thank you.

Investing is necessary! Working for a paycheck all your life is no good, especially at retirement. This realization led me to seek out ways to increase my savings, and that's when I found KINGSTRADE FX. Payouts are amazingly fast and easy!.
